name: @stackra/support
purpose: Foundation utility layer — Str, Arr, Num, Env, Pipeline, Fluent, Uri, BaseRegistry, Manager, plus timing and control-flow helpers.
capabilities: Arr + collect() over collect.js for chained pipelines
Uri fluent URL builder + Env normaliser
sleep / retry / once / tap / optional / timebox helpers
Testing subpath with support helper mocks
when_to_use: Any package needs string / array / number / URL / env / control-flow helpers with a single canonical API.
when_not_to_use: Do not use native String / Array methods directly in application code — go through the Str / Arr façades.
